snapshot_note: Owner-accepted Overview V1 source snapshot. REER remains warning-status with CERR owner-supplied value and source URL pending; replace with automated HFI-backed source when accepted.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT annual GDP data, calculated YoY
caveats: SIAT 582 reports annual GDP growth rates as prior-year=100 index values; Overview stores index minus 100.
previous_value 6.7 is 2024 SIAT 582 index 106.7 minus 100.
SIAT 582 metadata note: for 2024 preliminary data.
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from SIAT sdmx_data_582 national aggregate Code 1700 annual GDP prior-year index for 2025: 107.7 minus 100. Previous value uses 2024 index 106.7 minus 100. Methodology: https://lib.stat.uz/ru/features-3/natsionalnye-scheta/622-yalpi-ichki-mahsulotni-ishlab-chiqarish-usulida-hisoblash-bo-yicha-uslubiy-nizom-3.

caveats: Preliminary quarterly national accounts release; owner verification is still required before public export.
previous_value 6.8 is the January-March 2025 real GDP growth rate shown in the same Statistics Agency Q1 GDP release.
Not an official GDP release; model nowcast only.
Owner-approved fallback value from the current static Overview estimate path; replace with accepted DFM Q2 artifact when available.
warnings: Static fallback nowcast is owner-approved for Overview V1 but is not an accepted DFM Q2 artifact.

caveats: Official CPI release; owner verification is still required before public export.
previous_value 7.3 is the February 2026 annual CPI rate shown in the same Statistics Agency March 2026 CPI release.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT CPI data, calculated MoM
caveats: Monthly inflation can be volatile; do not present as trend alone.
previous_value 0.2 is May 2026 SIAT 4585 aggregate index 100.2 minus 100.
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from SIAT sdmx_data_4585 aggregate CPI previous-month index for June 2026: 100.6 minus 100. Previous value uses May 2026 aggregate index 100.2 minus 100.

caveats: Category definitions must be stable before comparing over time.
previous_value 5.9 is the February 2026 annual food CPI rate shown in the same Statistics Agency March 2026 CPI release.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT trade data, calculated YoY
caveats: Trade values can be revised; show latest-vintage status.
YoY rate calculated from official SIAT cumulative monthly export levels: USD 12,638.1 million for January-May 2026 versus USD 14,816.4 million for January-May 2025.
warnings: Owner approved calculated YoY from official observed SIAT levels; current lock still classifies this metric as observed pending later cleanup.
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from SIAT sdmx_data_2407 cumulative monthly export levels for January-May 2026: USD 12,638.1 million versus USD 14,816.4 million for January-May 2025.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT trade data, calculated YoY

metrics.source_reference: Calculated from SIAT sdmx_data_2414 cumulative monthly import levels for January-May 2026: USD 20,127.4 million versus USD 16,494 million for January-May 2025.

metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT trade data, calculated
metrics.source_reference: Calculated from SIAT cumulative monthly goods trade levels for January-May 2026: exports USD 12,638.1 million from sdmx_data_2407, imports USD 20,127.4 million from sdmx_data_2414. Source URLs: https://api.siat.stat.uz/media/uploads/sdmx/sdmx_data_2407.json; https://api.siat.stat.uz/media/uploads/sdmx/sdmx_data_2414.json.
caveats: Displayed value is in USD billion (negative = goods trade deficit); calculated from SIAT cumulative monthly goods trade levels.
Label goods trade balance if services are excluded.
warnings: Owner approved calculated trade balance from official observed SIAT export and import levels; current lock unit remains broad pending later cleanup.

metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan policy rate
caveats: Event-based setting; do not infer policy stance without inflation context.

metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan exchange rate
caveats: Official/reference rate, not transaction-weighted market average.
Latest observation: requested 2026-07-16; actual CBU date/rate 2026-07-16, 12088.98 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-06-16; actual CBU date/rate 2026-06-16, 11979.83 UZS per USD.

metrics.source_reference: Calculated from CBU official USD rates: 12088.98 on 2026-07-16 and 11979.83 on 2026-06-16. Requested dates: latest 2026-07-16, prior-month 2026-06-16.
caveats: Latest observation: requested 2026-07-16; actual CBU date/rate 2026-07-16, 12088.98 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-06-16; actual CBU date/rate 2026-06-16, 11979.83 UZS per USD.
Prior-year comparison observation: requested 2025-07-16; actual CBU date/rate 2025-07-16, 12778.12 UZS per USD.
Formula: ((latest - comparison) / comparison) * 100.
Rounded to 2 decimal places.
Positive means USD/UZS is higher, i.e. UZS depreciation against USD; negative means USD/UZS is lower, i.e. UZS appreciation against USD.

metrics.source_reference: Calculated from CBU official USD rates: 12088.98 on 2026-07-16 and 12778.12 on 2025-07-16. Requested dates: latest 2026-07-16, prior-year 2025-07-16.
caveats: Latest observation: requested 2026-07-16; actual CBU date/rate 2026-07-16, 12088.98 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-06-16; actual CBU date/rate 2026-06-16, 11979.83 UZS per USD.
Prior-year comparison observation: requested 2025-07-16; actual CBU date/rate 2025-07-16, 12778.12 UZS per USD.
Formula: ((latest - comparison) / comparison) * 100.
Rounded to 2 decimal places.
Positive means USD/UZS is higher, i.e. UZS depreciation against USD; negative means USD/UZS is lower, i.e. UZS appreciation against USD.
